project.name: MIDAS
project.promise: Proof-first business operator that researches markets, verifies sources, drafts assets, requests approval for risky actions, records receipts, and tracks outcomes.
critical_flows: midas scan creates a Daily Revenue Move with sources and approval queue
midas eval proves source, budget, context, asset, provider, schedule, and skill guardrails
midas providers diagnoses local and cloud LLM routing
midas skills plan-download queues remote skill approval instead of installing automatically

runtime: midas eval passed 17/17 cases across 7 evals
package build produced wheel and sdist
visual: dashboard API/security tests pass; screenshot capture should be added before marketing launch assets
ci: GitHub Actions CI workflow runs pytest and midas eval
